info.name: Banklite API Collection
info.description: The collection is designed based on the BankLite Flask application API. No bearer token or authentication header is required. The API is account-ID based after login.

request.description: Valid login for customer1. Saves account_id, username, and full_name into the environment.
Negative login using a valid username with an invalid password.

exec: pm.test("Login failure success is false", function () {

request.description: Negative login using a username that does not exist.

exec: pm.test("Login failure success is false", function () {

request.description: Validation check for missing username and password. The application returns 401 for this validation path.

exec: pm.test("Validation failure success is false", function () {
